series_metadata.series_title: Federal Programs - Traffic Safety Reports / Safety Belt Surveys
series_metadata.series_description: Consists of all paperwork and files associated with miscellaneous safety belt surveys coducted throughout the state of Ohio and all traffic study reports and review team assessment reports generated for OTSO.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain current year in division office then transfer to ODPS Record Center for 6 years, then destroy. Total retention period is 7 years., Paper: Recycle
